title: British Meat Burger
description: A classic British-inspired burger featuring a juicy beef patty and topped with spicy sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Divide the ground beef into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a ball.
3. Flatten each ball into a patty.
4. Season the patties with salt and pepper.
5. Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F.
6. Meanwhile, toast the buns on the grill.
7. Assemble the burgers by spreading spicy sauce on the bottom bun, followed by a patty, some lettuce, tomato, cheese, onions, and pickles.
8. Drizzle mayonnaise on top of the burger.
9. Place the top bun on the burger.
